_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning to use our full knowledge of the spelling system to spell accurately and to manipulate standard and non-standard spelling for particular effects.

_source.w: We are learning to use our full knowledge of the spelling system to spell accurately and to manipulate standard and non-standard spelling for particular effects.
y: Complete mastery of the spelling system gives us both accuracy and creative freedom.
Understanding how to break rules deliberately — and knowing what effect it creates — is a sign of true mastery.
This dual command of standard and non-standard spelling serves us in both academic and creative contexts.
eg: We spell accurately and consistently in all formal writing contexts.
We analyse how published authors use non-standard spelling to represent accent, dialect or character voice.
We manipulate spelling deliberately in our own creative writing for specific effects.
We discuss the relationship between standard spelling conventions and the reality of language variation.
We evaluate when non-standard spelling enhances a text and when it undermines it.
We use our comprehensive spelling knowledge to support error-free academic and professional writing.
